home.heroSubtitle: Scientific weight management tools to help you achieve your health goals
home.heroDescription: Use accurate TDEE and BMI calculators to track your body data changes
home.feature1Desc: Calculate your Total Daily Energy Expenditure using the Mifflin-St Jeor formula
home.feature2Desc: Quickly calculate BMI with visual charts to assess your health status
home.feature3Desc: Record weight, body fat, muscle mass and view trend changes
home.feature4Desc: Set target weight, track progress, get personalized recommendations
home.tdeeCardDesc: Calculate your BMR and daily calorie needs
home.bmiCardDesc: Evaluate if your weight is in a healthy range
home.dashboardDesc: Login to view full dashboard and body trend charts

tdee.title: TDEE Calculator - Total Daily Energy Expenditure
tdee.description: Calculate your Total Daily Energy Expenditure (TDEE) using the Mifflin-St Jeor formula. Understand calories needed for maintenance, weight loss, or weight gain.
tdee.subtitle: Calculate Your Daily Energy Needs
tdee.formulaNote: Using Mifflin-St Jeor formula, the most accurate BMR calculation method

activityLevels.sedentaryDesc: Little or no exercise, desk job
activityLevels.veryActiveDesc: Physical job or training twice daily

tdee.bmrDesc: Minimum energy needed for basic life functions
tdee.tdeeDesc: Actual daily calories burned considering activity level
tdee.tip1: For weight loss: Keep intake below TDEE but not below BMR
tdee.tip2: For weight gain: Keep intake above TDEE with strength training
tdee.tip3: Measure weight weekly and adjust calories based on progress
tdee.tip4: Combine with exercise for better results and body composition

bmi.title: BMI Calculator - Body Mass Index
bmi.description: Calculate your BMI with visual charts to assess weight health status and get personalized health recommendations.
bmi.subtitle: Assess Your Weight Health

healthAdvice.underweightDesc: Consider increasing nutrition intake with balanced diet and moderate exercise
healthAdvice.normalDesc: Continue maintaining healthy lifestyle with balanced diet and regular exercise
healthAdvice.overweightDesc: Consider controlling calorie intake and increasing exercise, aim for 0.5-1kg/week loss
healthAdvice.obeseDesc: Consider seeking professional medical advice for a scientific weight loss plan

bmi.idealWeightDesc: Based on BMI 18.5-24.9, your ideal weight range is
bmi.weightNote: BMI is for reference only. People with higher muscle mass may have higher BMI while being healthy
bmi.tip1: BMI is just one health indicator, consider body fat percentage for comprehensive assessment
bmi.tip2: Asian BMI standards differ slightly, 23-24.9 is considered overweight risk
bmi.tip3: Regular exercise and balanced diet are key to maintaining healthy weight
bmi.tip4: Consult a doctor or nutritionist for health concerns

login.title: Login - FitWiz
login.description: Login to FitWiz to track your health data and achieve your health goals

error.shortPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters
error.loginFailed: Login failed, please check email and password
error.googleFailed: Google login failed, please try again

login.createAccountDesc: Join FitWiz and start your health journey

metrics.title: Body Metrics Tracking
metrics.description: Record and track your body data changes including weight, body fat, BMI and more
metrics.subtitle: Record Your Body Metrics
metrics.confirmDeleteMsg: Are you sure you want to delete this record? This cannot be undone.
metrics.noRecordsDesc: Click the button above to add your first record
metrics.loginRequiredDesc: Login to record and view your body metrics
metrics.autoCalcNote: BMI is auto-calculated from weight and height

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: View your health data overview, trend charts and goal progress
dashboard.subtitle: Your Health Overview
dashboard.noTargetDesc: Set a target weight to track progress
dashboard.loginRequiredDesc: Login to view your personal dashboard

footer.aboutDesc: FitWiz is a free health management tool helping you track body data and achieve health goals.
footer.disclaimer: Disclaimer: Results provided are for reference only and do not constitute medical advice. Consult a doctor for health concerns.
